who: finance operations managers in accounting firms processing 10–20 invoices/month
offer: For finance operations managers in accounting firms processing 10–20 invoices/month, inefficient expense report auditing causes delays in approvals. We streamline the workflow instead of manual tracking and email approvals.
problem: Inefficient expense report auditing and approval processes lead to delays.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for finance operations managers
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions about similar workflows
DM outreach to finance operations managers with demo video
Participate in community forums sharing relevant tools
try_it: Let users try manual expense report submission and email notifications for approvals on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing the manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post a weekly progress update in a relevant community
automation_simplification_ideas: One-click export of a simple report
